major.name: AstroTalk
major.notes: Dominant leader. Rs 659Cr ($77M) revenue FY24, 60M users, profit 12x to Rs 100Cr, targeting IPO 2026. Raised $14M Jun 2024.

major.name: Astroyogi
major.notes: Established player. Rs 85.3Cr revenue FY24. Metro and Tier-2 cities focus. Founded 2015.

major.name: InstaAstro
major.notes: Fast-growing newer entrant. Rs 21.1Cr revenue. 1M+ downloads, 1500+ astrologers. Launched 2021.

minor.name: Clickastro
minor.notes: South India focus. Strong in Kerala/Tamil Nadu market.

minor.name: GaneshaSpeaks
minor.notes: Rs 13.7Cr revenue FY24. One of the early astrology platforms in India.

discovery.global: Global astrology app market valued at $4-5B in 2024, projected to reach $9B by 2030 at ~24% CAGR. AI integration in 47% of apps. North America 34% share, Asia-Pacific 31%. 48% of users engage daily. AstroTalk is the dominant global player despite being India-born. Key trend: AI horoscope generation reducing prediction time by 30-45%. Session duration improving from 5 to 8 minutes with AI features.
discovery.india: India astrology app market: $163M in 2024, projected $1.79B by 2030 at 49% CAGR — fastest growing globally. AstroTalk dominates with ~80% market share, Rs 659Cr ($77M) revenue FY24, 60M users, profit jumped 12x to Rs 100Cr, targeting IPO 2026. Astroyogi Rs 85.3Cr, InstaAstro Rs 21.1Cr, GaneshaSpeaks Rs 13.7Cr. 70% revenue from India/South Asia, 30% international. User acquisition cost INR 600-900 recovered in 6-8 months. Regional language localization boosts Android retention by 10-20%. High retention in 40+ demographic: 35-44% at 90 days. AI-first players (Astro247, MyNaksh) are emerging as a new category.
discovery.china: China online mysticism market $14B annually. 70.3% of Chinese respondents aware of astrology. Tencent's Cece leads with 1M+ MAU — combines BaZi, Tarot, Zi Wei Dou Shu, AI fortune-telling bots and 24-hour livestream astrologers. Government bans monetization of 'superstitious' content on WeChat; creators work around via English content. Young people driving growth amid economic uncertainty. AI BaZi apps emerging: Cantian AI, BaZi Lab. Western astrology gaining traction with younger demographics.
